nodes.speaker: Keiko
nodes.text: Wait... I hear it beneath us.

nodes.speaker: Narrator
nodes.text: You notice a faint blue light leaking through a massive slab of stone tangled with giant veins.

nodes.speaker: Objective
nodes.text: Use Murial's power to lift the collapsed stone and tear away the tangled veins.

nodes.speaker: Narrator
nodes.text: The stone crashes aside, revealing a glowing Somnia Seed resting within a small crystalline chamber.

nodes.speaker: Kael
nodes.text: Is... that one of the crystals?

nodes.speaker: Feanor
nodes.text: Yes. It's the Somnia Seed. It stores the energy needed to restore the Somnolume Shrine.
